name: Unusual and not safe experiments
short_description: Unusual and NOT Safe Experiments is an action-puzzle game where you control a robot trying to escape from an abandoned complex, overcoming traps and solving puzzles.
detailed_description:
In Unusual and NOT Safe Experiments, you help a robot escape from an abandoned industrial complex, collecting floppy disks and avoiding traps. Use mechanisms to solve puzzles and overcome obstacles.

Key Features:

An action-puzzle game with elements of speed and reflexes.

60 levels with diverse traps and mechanical challenges.

Improve logic and quick thinking through complex puzzles.

A variety of mechanisms to manipulate and progress through levels.

Challenging levels that require precision and attention to detail.
